他，是一柄直插敌心脏的尖刀。一边是伪装下的步步惊心，一边是信仰支撑的生死任务。他需要获取绝密情报，瓦解敌人阴谋；他要锄杀叛徒汉奸，清理门户；他要营救深陷囹圄的关键内线，每一次行动都游走在暴露边缘。

他，是一柄直插敌心脏的尖刀。一边是伪装下的步步惊心，一边是信仰支撑的生死任务。他需要获取绝密情报，瓦解敌人阴谋；他要锄杀叛徒汉奸，清理门户；他要营救深陷囹圄的关键内线，每一次行动都游走在暴露边缘。
在刀尖上跳舞的日子里，在这座沉浮于谍海的孤城中，有隐秘战线上最孤独也最危险的潜伏，有智力与勇气的极限较量。面对层层杀机与人性考验，苏景尧能否在黎明到来前，蛰伏到底，完成使命？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/8f8dc926822cf08335243c42f17cf206~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三金三土","author_id":"","book_id":"7568737070634519576","book_name":"谍海孤城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"8.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":973,"name":"战争军旅","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=973&name=战争军旅&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7568737105438837785","read_count":"36901","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1073629"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"159","tags":"精品小说,战争军旅","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8f8dc926822cf08335243c42f17cf206~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435308&x-signature=VgLuoUtVli7F3bIgKcC03LRXujI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4201,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":491},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606729772114871065","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，不是穿越，真实感强。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771081864,"group_id":"7568737070634519576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N
